Here youтАЩll find everything from state

item.title: Welcome
item.description:
Coneto: A React UI Library for Every Use Case, Done Right
Deliver apps in half the time with Coneto, free of charge! Coneto is _the_ extremely complete React UI library created by Systatum. It is designed with modernity, simplicity, and usability at its core.
Here youтАЩll find everything from state

item.title: Avatar - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Avatar** component displays a user profile representation using either an image or generated initials.
It automatically generates a background color and initials when no image is provided, and supports optional interaction such as uploading a new profile picture.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯзС Displays **profile image** or **generated initials** - ЁЯОи Automatic **background color generation** - ЁЯФд Smart **initials generation** (first + last name) - ЁЯУ╖ Optional **image upload (changeable mode)** - ЁЯЦ▒я╕П Clickable interaction support - ЁЯзй Customizable size and styles
--- ЁЯз▒ Component Structure
```tsx <Avatar firstName="John" lastName="Doe" profileImageUrl="https://example.com/avatar.jpg" /> ```
--- тЪЩя╕П Core Behaviors Image Rendering - Uses `profileImageUrl` if provided - Falls back to initials if image is missing Initials Generation - Uses first letter of `firstName` + `lastName` - If no last name тЖТ uses first 2 letters of first name Changeable Mode - Enable with `changeable` - Click avatar to trigger file input - Calls `onChange(e, file)` Click Handling - Supports `onClick` when not in `changeable` mode - Automatically becomes clickable if interaction is provided
--- ЁЯОп Usage Guidelines - Use for **user identity representation** - Provide `profileImageUrl` when available - Enable `changeable` for editable profile flows - Adjust `frameSize` and `fontSize` for layout consistency

item.title: Badge - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Badge** component is a flexible UI element used to display small pieces of contextual information such as statuses, labels, or tags.
It supports predefined variants, custom colors, optional indicators, and interactive actions.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯОи Predefined **color variants** (neutral, green, yellow, red) - ЁЯОп Fully customizable **background, text, and circle colors** - ЁЯФ╡ Optional **status indicator circle** - тЪб Support for **interactive actions (icons/buttons)** - ЁЯзй Flexible layout with caption and actions - тЩ┐ Accessible with ARIA labels
--- ЁЯз▒ Component Structure
```tsx <Badge variant="green" caption="Active" withCircle /> ```
--- тЪЩя╕П Core Behaviors Variants - Use `variant` for predefined styles - Can be overridden by custom colors Custom Colors - `backgroundColor`, `textColor`, `circleColor` - Take priority over variant styles Circle Indicator - Enable with `withCircle` - Uses generated or custom color Actions - Add interactive icons via `actions` - Each action supports click handlers and styles
--- ЁЯОп Usage Guidelines - Use for **status indicators** (e.g. Active, Pending, Error) - Keep captions **short and meaningful** - Use `withCircle` for visual emphasis - Use `actions` for quick inline interactions

item.title: Boxbar - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Boxbar** component is a responsive container designed to display a collection of items in a horizontal, wrapped layout with automatic collapsing behavior.
It intelligently measures its content and shows a toggle button when items overflow beyond the first row.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯУж Flexible **wrapped layout** using flexbox - ЁЯУП Automatically detects **overflow content** - ЁЯФ╜ Collapsible / expandable behavior - ЁЯОп Smart **first-row height calculation** - тЪб Smooth animation using Framer Motion - ЁЯзй Fully customizable styles
--- ЁЯз▒ Component Structure
```tsx <Boxbar> <Badge caption="Item 1" /> <Badge caption="Item 2" /> <Badge caption="Item 3" /> </Boxbar> ```
--- тЪЩя╕П Core Behaviors Collapsing - Initially shows only the **first row** - Expands when toggle button is clicked Auto Measurement - Uses `ResizeObserver` - Recalculates height when content changes Toggle Button - Appears only when content overflows - Rotates icon on expand/collapse
--- ЁЯОп Usage Guidelines - Use for **tags, filters, or grouped items** - Ideal when content can grow dynamically - Avoid using with extremely large DOM lists

item.title: Calendar - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Calendar** is an interactive date picker supporting various selection scenarios such as single, multiple, and ranged dates.
It provides a clean UI for navigating months and years, supports custom formatting, and allows deep customization for styling and behavior.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯУЕ **Multiple selection modes**: single, multiple, ranged - ЁЯФБ **Month & year navigation** - ЁЯЪл Optional **weekend disabling** - ЁЯФд Custom **day & month labels** - ЁЯОп **Today shortcut button** - ЁЯОи Fully customizable **styles** - ЁЯФФ Event callbacks for **changes & interactions**
--- тЪЩя╕П Selection Modes
- `single`: Select one date - `multiple`: Select multiple dates - `ranged`: Select start and end date
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use **single mode** for simple date picking - Use **multiple mode** for tagging or event selection - Use **ranged mode** for booking or reporting ranges - Disable weekends when handling business-only workflows

item.title: CapsuleTab - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **CapsuleTab** component is a tab-based layout built on top of the `Capsule` component, providing a clean and modern way to switch between multiple content sections.
It supports both **controlled** and **uncontrolled** modes, allowing flexible state management depending on your use case.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯзн **Tab navigation** using capsule-style UI - ЁЯФБ Supports **controlled & uncontrolled state** - ЁЯОи Customizable **active tab background** - ЁЯзй Flexible **content rendering per tab** - ЁЯОп Fully customizable **styles per section**
--- тЪЩя╕П Behavior Uncontrolled Mode - Uses internal state - Default tab is based on `activeTab` Controlled Mode - Controlled via `activeTab` + `onTabChange` - Parent manages selected tab state
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use for **section switching** inside a single page - Keep tab titles **short and clear** - Use controlled mode when syncing with URL / global state

item.title: Capsule - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Capsule** component is designed for switching between generally two options.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯзн **Switch selection** with smooth animated indicator - ЁЯОи Customizable **active background & colors** - ЁЯзй Supports **icons and labels** - ЁЯУП Flexible **layout modes** (default / full width) - тЪая╕П Built-in **error handling & validation** - ЁЯОп Fully customizable **styles** - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**
--- тЪЩя╕П Behavior
- If `activeTab` is not provided, the **first tab is selected automatically** - Clicking a tab triggers `onTabChange` - Hover state shows a preview border animation - Disabled state prevents interaction
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use for **switching between related views or filters** - Keep tab labels **short and clear** - Use **icons** for better visual recognition - Use `full` mode when integrating into layouts like headers or forms

item.title: Card - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Card** component is a flexible container used to group related content and actions within a structured layout. It supports optional headers, footers, interactive controls, and animated content visibility.
Key features include: - **Flexible Layout**: Supports title, subtitle, content, and footer sections. - **Customizable Appearance**: Control shadow, border radius, and padding. - **Header Actions**: Add action buttons or controls to the header area. - **Closable**: Optional close button for dismissible cards. - **Toggleable Content**: Collapse or expand content with smooth animations. - **Animation Support**: Built-in expand/collapse transitions using Framer Motion. - **Styling Overrides**: Customize each section using CSS props.
This component is ideal for dashboards, panels, grouped content, and modular UI sections.

item.title: Checkbox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Checkbox** component allows users to select or deselect an option. It supports a main label, optional description, error states, helper text, and full style customization.
It works well in forms and can be used in both **standalone** and **form-integrated** contexts.
--- тЬи Features - тЬЕ Supports **checked, unchecked, and indeterminate** states - ЁЯТб Optional **highlight background** when checked - тЭМ Displays **error states** with customizable error messages - ЁЯУЭ Supports **helper text** for guidance - ЁЯОи Fully customizable **styles** for wrapper, label, box, icon, and description - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**
--- тЪЩя╕П Behavior Standalone Usage - Pass `checked` and `onChange` for controlled usage - Pass `indeterminate` to show a horizontal line instead of a checkmark - `highlightOnChecked` changes the background when checked Form Integration - Can set `label` or `helper` context - Use `showError` and `errorMessage` to show validation errors - `name` and `id` can be set for form submission as well as accessibility
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use for **boolean options** in forms or settings - Keep label text **short and descriptive** - Use controlled mode when checkbox state needs to **sync with parent / form state** - Use `highlightOnChecked` for **visually emphasizing selections**

item.title: Chips - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Chips** component allows selection of multiple items from a list, with optional filtering, creation of new chips, and full style customization. It is primarily ideal for tagging.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯП╖я╕П **Multiple selection** support. - ЁЯФО **Filterable input** to quickly search options - тЮХ **Creatable chips** when enabled, with custom form support - тЬЕ **Selected chips** are displayed prominently with optional custom renderer - тЭМ Handles **empty states** and custom messages - ЁЯОи Fully **customizable styles** for drawer, chips, labels, and container - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration** - ЁЯФТ Has **disabled** state to prevent edit
--- тЪЩя╕П Behavior Selection - Click on a chip in the dropdown to select/deselect - Already selected chips are displayed in the main input area - Supports keyboard navigation (ArrowUp, ArrowDown, Enter) Filtering - Input value filters the list of options - Filtering is case-insensitive - When no matches, can show empty slate or option to create new chip Creatable Chips - When `creatable` is true, users can add new chips - Displays a special item with `missingOptionLabel` text - Supports custom render form via `missingOptionForm` Styles - Use `styles` prop to override: - container - chips container - individual chips - drawer - labels - Each selected chip can have its own styles
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use for **tagging or multi-select** input scenarios - Keep chip labels **short for readability** - Use controlled props (`selectedOptions`, `inputValue`) for syncing state with forms - Use `renderer` for fully custom chip rendering

item.title: ChoiceGroup - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **ChoiceGroup** component is a wrapper for multiple selection inputs (like **Checkbox** or **Radio**) and ensures consistent layout, spacing, and styles. It can automatically detect if the children are radio buttons and switch to a row/grid layout.
--- тЬи Features - тЬЕ Supports checkboxe and radio components - ЁЯФ╣ Automatic layout detection: "button" mode renders radio buttons in a flat grid, otherwise render options/checkboxes vertically - ЁЯОи Fully customizable styles via `styles` prop - ЁЯзй Each child can still have individual styles
--- тЪЩя╕П Behavior - Adds spacing and optional dividers between children - Automatically sets `highlightOnChecked` for all children - Radio buttons in "button" mode: - Display in a flat grid - Border applied to each button - Checkbox as well as radio buttons (but not in "button mode") will be in vertical layout: - Full-width - Feature optional divider between each item
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use for grouping related checkboxes or radio buttons in forms - Use `styles.containerStyle` to adjust layout, width, or spacing - Use `styles.dividerStyle` to override divider appearance - Ideal for forms, selection cards, or segmented button groups

item.title: Colorbox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Colorbox** is a color picker input having both visual color preview and hexadecimal text input.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯСА **Visual color preview** along with hex input - ЁЯФБ Supports **real-time color changes** via typing or selecting - ЁЯЪл **Disabled state** to prevent interaction - ЁЯЫа Shows **error state** with custom message and styling - ЁЯОи Fully **customizable styles** - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration** --- тЪЩя╕П Behavior - Updates color value on both color picker and text input - Automatically prepends '#' in hex input - Debounces onChange updates to improve performance - Handles focus/hover interactions for UI highlighting
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use for selecting colors in forms, design tools, or settings - Combine with **labels, helper text, and error messages** for clarity - Override default styling using the `styles` prop - Works with controlled components via `value` and `onChange`
---

item.title: Combobox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Combobox makes use of the base Selectbox, featuring searchability, options-grouping, multi-options, among other things.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯФН Built-in **search filtering** - ЁЯУВ Supports **grouped options** with collapsible categories - тЬЕ **Single & multiple selection** - ЁЯОп Keyboard and mouse interaction support - тЪб Dynamic filtering based on user input - ЁЯзй Custom **actions** inside dropdown - ЁЯЪл Handles **disabled** and **hidden** options - ЁЯУК Supports **controlled and uncontrolled** modes
--- ЁЯУж Option Types Single Option ```ts { text: string; value: string | number; } ``` Grouped Option ```ts { category: string; options: OptionProps[]; collapsible?: boolean; initialState?: "opened" | "closed"; } ```
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use **grouped options** for large datasets - Enable `multiple` for multi-select use cases - Use **controlled mode** to keep the value synchronized with the input and ensure it is consistently validated. - Use `maxSelectableItems` to limit selections

item.title: Crumb - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Crumb** is a breadcrumb navigation component that shows the user's location in a hierarchy.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯФЧ Displays a sequence of items representing navigation hierarchy - тЪб Automatically collapses middle items into an ellipsis when exceeding `maxShown` - ЁЯСЖ Click ellipsis to expand hidden items - ЁЯОи Customizable font size, text color, hover color, arrow color, and last item color - ЁЯЦ╝ Custom icon separators (default: arrow) - ЁЯПГ Smooth animations for item transitions - ЁЯЦ▒ Supports clickable or static items
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use `Crumb.Item` for each item in the breadcrumb - Set `maxShown` to control collapsing behavior - Use `arrowColor` or `iconSeparator` for custom icons - Customize styles with the `styles` prop for container overrides

item.title: Datebox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Datebox** is an input component for selecting dates. It leverages a calendar dropdown for easy date picking, supports single or multiple dates, and integrates with forms.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯУЕ **Calendar dropdown** for selecting dates - ЁЯФТ Has **disabled** state - тЪая╕П Handles **error messages** with visual feedback - ЁЯОи Customizable **styles** for input, calendar, and dropdown - ЁЯХ╣я╕П Optional **today button** and custom footer in calendar - тЪЩя╕П Supports **selectability modes** and **weekday restrictions** - ЁЯЧСя╕П Supports **clearing selection** - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use `selectedDates` and `onChange` for controlled date selection - Use `placeholder` to show expected input format - Use `showError` and `errorMessage` for validation feedback - Customize styles via `styles` prop: - **self** тАУ input and selectbox wrapper - Use `calendarFooter` to render custom footer content inside calendar - Use `calendarTodayButtonCaption` to customize today button text - Use `calendarSelectabilityMode` to restrict selectable dates - Can be integrated into **StatefulForm** or other controlled forms

item.title: Dialog - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Dialog is a modal component for displaying messages, forms, or custom content in a focused overlay. It supports headers with title/subtitle/icon, body content, footer actions, and customizable styles.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯЯв **Controlled visibility** with `isOpen` - ЁЯФФ **Optional closable** via overlay click, Escape key, or close button - ЁЯП╖я╕П **Header** with title, subtitle, and optional icon - ЁЯОп **Custom footer buttons** with callbacks - ЁЯУЭ **Custom content** can be rendered in the body - ЁЯОи Fully **styleable** via `styles` prop - ЁЯЪА Smooth **zoom in/out animation** on open/close
--- ЁЯУМ Usage - Use **Dialog.show(config)** and **Dialog.hide()** for imperative control. - Provide `onVisibilityChange` to control open/close externally (controlled mode). - Action buttons inside the dialog is actionable through **onClick**. - Styles are optional and override sections individually.

item.title: DocumentViewer - Coneto React UI
item.description:
DocumentViewer is a powerful component for displaying documents such as PDFs, images, encoded files, or uploaded files, with interactive features like zooming, bounding boxes, and region selection. It comes with a customizable toolbar and supports full styling.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯУЭ **Supports multiple sources**: PDF, image, file, or encoded string - ЁЯОп **Region selection** via mouse drag with `onRegionSelected` callback - ЁЯФ▓ **Bounding boxes** for highlighting or annotating sections - ЁЯФН **Zoom control** with predefined levels (75тАУ150%) - тЪЩя╕П **Custom PDF.js worker** via `libPdfJsWorkerSrc` - ЁЯП╖я╕П **Customizable labels** for toolbar text and page indicators - ЁЯОи **Fully styleable** through `styles` prop - ЁЯЪА Smooth **scroll preservation** when zooming - ЁЯЦ▒я╕П **Selectable content** with optional hover popups
--- ЁЯУМ Usage - Provide a **source** using the builder pattern: `pdf`, `image`, `file`, or `encodedString`. - Use `onRegionSelected` to handle region selections with coordinates. - Pass **boundingBoxes** to predefine highlights or annotations. - Set **initialZoom** to control default zoom level. - Customize toolbar labels via the `labels` prop. - Apply **custom styles** via `styles` for container, zoom input, selection boxes, or bounding boxes.
```tsx <DocumentViewer title="Sample PDF" source={(builder) => builder.pdf("/docs/sample.pdf")} initialZoom={100} boundingBoxes={[ { page: 1, x: 0.1, y: 0.1, width: 0.3, height: 0.2, contentOnHover: "Note" } ]} onRegionSelected={(region) => console.log(region)} labels={{ zoomPlaceholder: "Set zoom", totalPages: ({ currentPage, totalPages }) => `${currentPage}/${totalPages}` }} styles={{ containerStyle: css`border: 1px solid #ccc;`, boxStyle: css`border-color: red;`, selectionStyle: css`background: rgba(255,0,0,0.2);`, }} /> ```

item.title: DormantText - Coneto React UI
item.description:
DormantText is an editable text component that starts in a **dormant (read-only) state** and switches to an **active input** when clicked. It supports optional action buttons, custom icons, and flexible styling, making it ideal for inline editing scenarios such as forms, tables, or settings panels.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯУЭ **Dormant and active states**: Click to switch from read-only text to editable input. - тЬНя╕П **Supports children inputs**: Accepts any React input element (text, number, select, etc.). - ЁЯОп **Custom action icons**: Default check/cancel icons, or override with your own via `icon`. - тМия╕П **Flexible input confirmation**: Accept changes on 'Enter', 'click', or 'all' interactions. - тЭМ **Cancelable editing**: Press Escape or click cancel button to revert changes. - ЁЯТЕ **Fully styleable**: Use `styles` prop to customize dormant label, active wrapper, or action buttons. - ЁЯУР **Dynamic sizing**: Automatically measures label and input dimensions to match layout. - ЁЯЦ▒я╕П **Full-width support**: Stretch dormant label to container width or limit via `dormantedMaxWidth`.
--- ЁЯУМ Usage - Set the **content** prop for the text displayed when dormant. - Pass **children** as input elements for editing mode. - Use **onActionClick** to handle confirmed edits. - Use **onCancelRequested** to handle cancel events. - Customize **styles** for each state using CSSProp objects. - Optionally set **dormantedFontSize**, **fullWidth**, **acceptChangeOn**, **cancelable**, and **icon**.
```tsx <DormantText content="Click to edit" dormantedFontSize={16} fullWidth={false} acceptChangeOn="enter" cancelable={true} onActive={() => console.log("Activated")} onActionClick={() => console.log("Saved")} onCancelRequested={() => console.log("Canceled")} styles={{ dormantedStyle: css`color: #333; background: #f9f9f9;`, activeStyle: css`border: 1px solid #ccc;`, actionStyle: css`background: #e0e0e0;`, }} > <input type="text" placeholder="Edit me" /> </DormantText> ```
- **icon** prop example: ```tsx <DormantText icon={{ image: RiCheckLine, color: "#4caf50", size: 18 }} /> ```

item.title: DrawerTab - Coneto React UI
item.description:
DrawerTab is a flexible sidebar component that displays multiple tabbed panels which can slide in from the left or right. Each tab can contain custom content and icons, with full control over styling and animations. Ideal for dashboards, side menus, or context-sensitive panels. --- тЬи Features - ЁЯЧВя╕П **Multiple tabs**: Define multiple tabs with unique content and icons. - тЮбя╕П **Slide-in drawer**: Supports left or right positioning via the `position` prop. - ЁЯЦ▒я╕П **Interactive tab selection**: Click a tab button to open the drawer and display content. - тЭМ **Close button**: Close the drawer manually with a built-in close button. - ЁЯОи **Customizable styles**: Control tab buttons and drawer container via `styles` prop. - тЪб **Smooth animations**: Built using Framer Motion for spring-based drawer transitions. - ЁЯУР **Responsive-ready**: Automatically adjusts on larger screens. --- ЁЯУМ Usage - Provide a `tabs` array containing `id`, `title`, `icon`, and `content`. - Set the `position` prop to either `left` or `right`. - Optionally pass `styles` to customize drawer and tab button appearance. ```tsx Notification content here, }, { id: "tab2", title: "Settings", icon: RiCloseLine, content:
Settings content here
, }, ]} styles={{ drawerTabStyle: css` background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ccc; `, tabStyle: css` background: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 0.5rem; `, }} /> ``` - Tabs open the drawer on click. Clicking the selected tab again or the close button closes it. - You can replace `icon` with any React component from Remix Icon or custom SVG.

item.title: EmptySlate - Coneto React UI
item.description:
EmptySlate is a versatile component to display a visually appealing empty state in your UI. It can include an image, title, subtitle, and optional actions like buttons, guiding users on what to do next. Perfect for dashboards, lists, or any content area with no data.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯЦ╝я╕П **Image support**: Display a visual illustration via the `imageUrl` prop. - ЁЯУЭ **Title and subtitle**: Provide clear messaging with optional subtitle for additional context. - ЁЯЦ▒я╕П **Action support**: Render custom interactive elements like buttons, links, or call-to-action components. - ЁЯОи **Fully styleable**: Customize container, image, title, subtitle, and action styles via the `styles` prop. - тЪб **Lightweight and flexible**: Minimal structure so you can compose complex empty states easily.
--- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx <EmptySlate imageUrl="/images/empty-state.svg" title="No Items Found" subtitle="Try adjusting your filters or adding a new item." actions={ <> <Button variant="default">Add Item</Button> <Button variant="primary">Learn More</Button> </> } styles={{ containerStyle: css`padding: 2rem; text-align: center;`, imageStyle: css`max-width: 200px; margin: 0 auto;`, titleStyle: css`font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600;`, subtitleStyle: css`font-size: 1rem; color: #666;`, actionsStyle: css`margin-top: 1rem;`, }} /> ```
- Use `imageUrl` to give a visual cue for the empty state. - Titles and subtitles guide the user and provide context. - Actions can include buttons or links to direct users on what to do next. - Styles can be overridden for each part to match your design system.

item.title: ErrorSlate - Coneto React UI
item.description:
ErrorSlate is a visually engaging component to display HTTP error codes in a 3D rotating cube format, with optional title and additional content. ItтАЩs perfect for error pages, dashboards, or empty states that need an interactive and memorable UI. --- тЬи Features - ЁЯФв **HTTP error codes**: Supports common HTTP status codes (400, 401, 403, 404, 500, etc.). - ЁЯзК **3D rotating cube**: Each digit of the error code is displayed on a cube face, creating a dynamic, animated effect. - ЁЯЦЛя╕П **Custom titles**: Optional descriptive title below the cube. - ЁЯзй **Additional content**: Optional children prop to add messages, actions, or guidance below the title. - ЁЯОи **Customizable styles**: Override title typography and cube face appearance via the `styles` prop. --- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx

Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.

} styles={{ titleStyle: css` font-size: 3rem; color: #333; `, cubeFaceStyle: css` background-color: #ff4d4f; border-color: #d9363e; font-size: 2rem; `, }} /> ``` - Use `code` to display the HTTP error number on the animated cube. - Titles and children provide additional context or actions. - Customize appearance using `styles.titleStyle` and `styles.cubeFaceStyle`. - Works with any valid ReactNode in the `children` prop for messages, buttons, or links.

item.title: FieldLane - Coneto React UI
item.description:
FieldLane is a flexible form field wrapper that supports labels, helper text, error states, dropdowns, custom actions, and additional content. ItтАЩs designed for highly customizable forms where inputs need visual clarity, interactivity, and optional validation feedback.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯП╖ **Label support**: Configurable position ("top" or "left"), width, gap, and required indicator. - тЪая╕П **Error mark**: Show inline error messages with optional error icons positioned absolutely or relatively. - ЁЯЦ▒ **Actions buttons**: Attach multiple action buttons or icons with tooltips, click handlers, and visibility control. - тмЗя╕П **Dropdowns**: Include one or multiple dropdowns with optional filtering, custom renderers, and styling. - ЁЯОи **Customizable styles**: Override styles for the container, label, as well as the input/control area. - ЁЯзй **Flexible children**: Embed any ReactNode (input, select, custom component) as field content. - тЫФ **Disabled state**: Disable the entire field with visual feedback.
--- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx <FieldLane label="Username" required helper="Enter your unique username" showError={true} errorMessage="This field is required" errorIconPosition="absolute" dropdowns={[ { caption: "Options", options: [ { text: "Option 1", value: "1" }, { text: "Option 2", value: "2" }, ], withFilter: true, onChange: (val) => console.log("Selected:", val), }, ]} actions={[ { title: "Check", icon: { image: RiCheckLine }, onClick: () => console.log("Clicked"), }, ]} styles={{ containerStyle: css`border: 1px solid #ccc;`, labelStyle: css`font-weight: bold;`, controlStyle: css`background: #f9fafb;`, bodyStyle: css`gap: 0.5rem;`, }} > <input type="text" placeholder="Enter username" /> </FieldLane> ```
- Use `label` for field names and `helper` for guidance. - `showError` and `errorMessage` handle validation display. - Attach multiple dropdowns and actions with optional custom rendering. - Fully styleable through the `styles` prop.

item.title: FileDropBox - Coneto React UI
FileInputBox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **FileInputBox** component provides an intuitive file upload interface, better suited for a single file upload not using AJAX.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯУВ Supports **single and multiple file uploads** - ЁЯз▓ **Drag-and-drop** file upload interaction - ЁЯУО Click to **browse files manually** - тЭМ Remove selected files individually - ЁЯОп Callback via `onFilesSelected(files: File[])` - тЪая╕П Built-in **error state handling** - ЁЯзй Fully customizable styles
--- ЁЯз▒ Component Structure
```tsx <FileInputBox label="Upload File" multiple onFilesSelected={(files) => console.log(files)} /> ```
--- тЪЩя╕П Core Behaviors File Selection - Click area to open file picker - Supports `multiple` file selection Drag & Drop - Drag files over the input area - Drop to upload instantly File Removal - Each file has a delete button - Updates state and triggers callback
--- ЁЯОп Usage Guidelines - Use for **file uploads in forms** - Enable `multiple` for batch uploads - Use `accept` to restrict file types - Handle `onFilesSelected` for processing files

item.title: Frame - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Frame** is a container component to group content visually. It optionally displays a title overlay and supports full customization of container and title styles. Ideal for creating card-like layouts, grouped form sections, or any visually separated content.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯП╖ **Title overlay**: Optional title displayed at the top border of the frame. - ЁЯОи **Customizable styles**: Override styles for container and title using styled-components `CSSProp`. - ЁЯзй **Flexible content**: Wrap any ReactNode inside the frame, such as forms, cards, or grouped inputs. - ЁЯЦ╝ **Visual separation**: Provides border, padding, rounded corners, and shadow for clear separation. - тЫФ **Accessible**: Uses `aria-label="frame"` for semantic clarity.
--- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx <Frame title="User Information" styles={{ containerStyle: css` border: 2px solid #60a5fa; background-color: #f0f9ff; padding: 2rem; `, titleStyle: css` color: #1d4ed8; font-weight: 600; `, }} > <form> <label> Name: <input type="text" placeholder="Enter your name" /> </label> <label> Email: <input type="email" placeholder="Enter your email" /> </label> </form> </Frame> ```
- Use `title` to label the frame visually. - Customize `containerStyle` for borders, shadows, background, and spacing. - Customize `titleStyle` for color, font size, and spacing of the title overlay. - Embed any ReactNode inside to structure content as needed.

item.title: Grid - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Grid is a versatile layout component that provides a responsive, customizable grid system for displaying content. It supports predefined presets, flexible gaps, optional width/height, and individual Grid.Card components with selection, thumbnails, and custom content. --- тЬи Features - ЁЯз▒ **Responsive grid presets**: Choose from multiple predefined layouts like `1-to-4`, `2-to-4`, or auto-fit configurations (`auto-fit-300`) for adaptive columns. - ЁЯУП **Custom spacing**: Adjust the gap between grid items with `gap` (number in px or any CSS size). - ЁЯЦ╝ **Grid.Card support**: Each item can display thumbnails, content, and be selectable with a hover and checkbox state. - ЁЯОи **Customizable styles**: Override container and card styles via `styles.self` using `CSSProp` for full visual control. - тЫФ **Selectable items**: Optionally allow Grid.Cards to be selectable with visual feedback. - ЁЯзй **Flexible children**: Embed any ReactNode inside cards, like forms, images, or interactive components. - ЁЯУР **Optional container sizing**: Set custom width and height for the grid wrapper. --- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx console.log("Card selected")} thumbnail="https://via.placeholder.com/150" styles={{ self: css` border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 4px; `, }} >

Card content goes here

Another card

 ``` - Use `preset` to quickly configure responsive layouts. - Adjust `gap` for spacing between items. - Embed any content inside `Grid.Card` including images, text, or custom components. - Use `selectable` and `isSelected` to handle card selection with optional checkboxes. - Fully style container and cards using `styles.self` with `CSSProp`.

item.title: Imagebox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Imagebox** is a file input component designed for images. It supports drag-and-drop, previewing selected files among other things.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯЦ╝ **Image preview**: Automatically displays a preview of the selected image file or an initial `url`. - ЁЯУВ **File selection**: Supports both drag & drop and browse file selection. - тЪб **Sizes**: Four predefined sizes (`xs`, `sm`, `md`, `lg`) controlling the box and icon dimensions. - тЪая╕П **Error handling**: Show inline error messages via FieldLane with optional icons. - ЁЯОи **Customizable styles**: Override container, label, and input styles via `styles.self`, `styles.labelStyle`, and `styles.containerStyle`. - тЫФ **Disabled state**: Disable interaction and provide visual feedback. - тЬПя╕П **Editable toggle**: Control whether the input is editable. - тЮХ **Add icon overlay**: Optional add icon that changes on drag-over.
--- ЁЯУМ Usage
```tsx <Imagebox label="Upload Profile Picture" name="profileImage" size="md" url="/images/default-avatar.png" showError={false} errorMessage="Invalid file" onFileSelected={(file) => console.log("Selected file:", file)} styles={{ containerStyle: css`padding: 8px; border-radius: 4px;`, labelStyle: css`font-weight: bold;`, self: css`border: 1px dashed #d1d5db;`, }} /> ```
- Use `onFileSelected` to handle file uploads. - The `url` prop sets an initial image, used if no file is selected. - Drag & drop and clicking the box both allow file selection. - Fully styleable using the `styles` prop for container, label, and input box. - Use `size` to control the dimensions and icon size. - Integrates with FieldLane for label, helper text, errors, and actions.

item.title: Keynote - Coneto React UI
Launchpad - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Launchpad** is a versatile content layout component that organizes sections and items into swipeable pages. It supports custom styling, pagination, draggable pages, and flexible section layouts.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯПЧ **Sections** тАУ Divide content into multiple `Launchpad.Section` blocks - ЁЯУж **Items** тАУ Each section can have multiple `Launchpad.Section.Item` elements - ЁЯФД **Swipeable pages** тАУ Automatically paginate sections when exceeding `maxSection` - ЁЯЦМ **Custom styles** тАУ Apply styles at container, section, separator, grid, and item levels - ЁЯОЫ **Grid presets** тАУ Configure layout of items using predefined grid presets - ЁЯЦ▒ **Pagination dots** тАУ Visual indication and navigation for multiple pages - ЁЯл│ **Drag & swipe support** тАУ Smooth drag and swipe interactivity
--- ЁЯЫа Usage
```tsx <Launchpad maxSection={2} containerStyle={{ padding: '1rem', border: '1px solid #ccc' }}> <Launchpad.Section title="Featured Apps" styles={{ containerStyle: { background: '#f9f9f9' } }}> <Launchpad.Section.Item href="/app1" iconUrl="https://picsum.photos/30" label="App 1" /> <Launchpad.Section.Item href="/app2" iconUrl="https://picsum.photos/30" label="App 2" /> </Launchpad.Section>
<Launchpad.Section title="Utilities"> <Launchpad.Section.Item href="/utility1" iconUrl="https://picsum.photos/30" label="Utility 1" /> </Launchpad.Section> </Launchpad> ```

item.title: List - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**List** organizes items optionally through some grouping as well as enabling rich interactivity, such as drag-and-drop, item search, among others.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯФ╣ **Searchable list** тАУ Add a search box to filter items dynamically - ЁЯЯв **Selectable items** тАУ Enable checkboxes for single or multiple selection - ЁЯл│ **Draggable items** тАУ Reorder items or groups via drag-and-drop - ЁЯУж **Grouping** тАУ Organize items into collapsible groups - ЁЯФД **Smooth animations** тАУ Animated motions and transitions - тП▒ **Max items with show more/less** тАУ Limit visible items and toggle extra items - ЁЯОи **Custom styles** тАУ Fully styleable via CSS-in-JS or styled-components - ЁЯТб **Custom actions** тАУ Render actionable buttons on each item or group
--- ЁЯЫа Usage
```tsx <List searchable={true} draggable={true} selectable={true} maxItems={3} labels={{ moreItemsText: "Show more", lessItemsText: "Show less" }} > <List.Item id="1" title="Item 1" subtitle="Subtitle 1" /> <List.Item id="2" title="Item 2" subtitle="Subtitle 2" /> <List.Item id="3" title="Item 3" subtitle="Subtitle 3" /> <List.Group id="group-1" title="Group 1"> <List.Item id="g1-1" title="Group 1 - Item 1" /> <List.Item id="g1-2" title="Group 1 - Item 2" /> </List.Group> </List> ```

item.title: LoadingSkeleton - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**LoadingSkeleton** is a great loader component to indicate that some content is still being loaded. You can customize the shimmer direction, speed, colors, among other things.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯФ╣ **Skeleton wrapper** тАУ Container for multiple skeleton items - ЁЯз▒ **Skeleton items** тАУ Individual blocks to represent text, avatars, or cards - ЁЯФД **Shimmer animation** тАУ Smooth loading effect with configurable direction - тП▒ **Adjustable speed** тАУ Predefined slow, normal, fast, or custom duration - ЁЯОи **Custom colors** тАУ Base and highlight colors for full theme control - ЁЯЫа **Custom styles** тАУ Apply styled-components CSS to wrapper or items
--- ЁЯЫа Usage
```tsx <LoadingSkeleton flashDirection="left-to-right" flashRate="fast" baseColor="#eee" highlightColor="#ddd" styles={{ self: css`padding: 12px; border-radius: 4px;` }} > <LoadingSkeleton.Item width={120} height={16} /> <LoadingSkeleton.Item width={200} height={16} /> <LoadingSkeleton.Item width="100%" height={24} /> </LoadingSkeleton> ```

item.title: LoadingSpinner - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**LoadingSpinner** тП│ is a flexible spinner component to indicate loading states. It supports customizable icon size, optional label text, spacing, and fully customizable styles.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯФД **Spinner icon**: Animated loading indicator - ЁЯП╖ **Optional label**: Display text next to the spinner - ЁЯУП **Customizable sizing**: Adjust icon diameter and text font size - тЖФя╕П **Adjustable gap**: Control space between spinner and label - ЁЯОи **Custom styles**: Override container, icon, and label styles with styled-components
--- ЁЯЫа Usage
```tsx <LoadingSpinner iconSize={24} textSize={14} label="Loading..." gap={8} styles={{ containerStyle: css`display: flex; align-items: center;`, iconStyle: css`stroke: #3498db;`, labelStyle: css`color: #555; font-weight: 500;`, }} /> ```

item.title: Messagebox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Messagebox displays information, alerts, warnings, or success messages in a structured, visually appealing box. You may add certain actionable buttons as well.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯП╖я╕П **Variants**: Supports multiple visual styles for contextual messaging. - ЁЯЦ╝я╕П **Icons**: Optional icon displayed alongside the message to indicate type or status. - ЁЯУД **Content**: Supports a main title and rich message content (children). - ЁЯФЧ **Action buttons**: Show actionable, in-context interactivity. - тЭМ **Closable**: Can be dismissed by the user if `closable` is set. - ЁЯОи **Custom styles**: Fully customizable via styled-components, including container, title, content, and action list. - тЩ┐ **Accessibility**: Proper ARIA roles and keyboard support for interactive elements.

item.title: ModalDialog - Coneto React UI
item.description:
ModalDialog is a versatile modal component for displaying important content, forms, or actions in a centered overlay. It supports controlled visibility, custom headers, footers, and styling.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯЦ╝я╕П **Custom content**: Render any ReactNode in the modal body. - ЁЯП╖я╕П **Header & subtitle**: Optional title and subtitle for context. - ЁЯФШ **Action buttons**: Footer buttons with loading, disabled state, and custom variants. - тЭМ **Closable**: Can be closed via Escape key, overlay click, or close button (configurable). - ЁЯФД **Controlled visibility**: `isOpen` prop with `onVisibilityChange` callback for external control. - ЁЯОи **Custom styles**: Override modal container, content, overlay, and other sections. - тЩ┐ **Accessibility**: Proper ARIA roles and keyboard navigation support.

item.title: Moneybox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Moneybox** is a monetary value input component with an optional currency switcher. Among other things, it features built-in comma/dot separator formatter and an optional currency dropdown.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯТ╡ **Formatted numeric input**: Supports comma/dot separators for thousands and decimals - ЁЯТ▒ **Editable currency**: Optional dropdown to select currency from `currencyOptions` - тЭМ **Error state**: Visual feedback with customizable error message - ЁЯП╖ **Label support**: Optional label above the input - ЁЯЦК **Placeholder & helper**: Guides users on expected input - ЁЯОи **Customizable styles**: Override input, container, and label styles - ЁЯУ▒ **Mobile-friendly**: `inputMode="decimal"` by default for numeric keyboards - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**
--- ЁЯЫа Usage
```tsx <Moneybox name="amount" value="123456.78" placeholder="Enter amount" currency="IDR" editableCurrency currencyOptions={[ { id: "IDR", name: "Indonesian Rupiah", symbol: "Rp" }, { id: "USD", name: "US Dollar", symbol: "$" }, ]} separator="comma" showError={false} onChange={(e) => console.log(e.target.name, e.target.value)} styles={{ self: css`font-size: 14px; color: #111;`, inputWrapperStyle: css`border-radius: 4px;`, }} /> ```

item.title: NavTab - Coneto React UI
OverlayBlocker - Coneto React UI
item.description:
ЁЯЫб **OverlayBlocker** is a flexible overlay component that blocks interaction with the content beneath it. Ideal for modals, dialogs, and temporary UI states. тЬи Features - ЁЯСА Show or hide overlay with the `show` prop - ЁЯФЭ Control stacking order using `zIndex` - ЁЯЦ▒ Click handling options: - **"close"**: Closes overlay when clicked (default) - **"preventDefault"**: Prevents automatic closing - **Function**: Custom behavior - ЁЯОи Fully styleable via `styles.self` (CSSProp compatible) - ЁЯФз Supports imperative `open` and `close` via `ref` ЁЯЫа Usage ```tsx { // custom behavior close(); }} styles={{ self: "background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);" }} >

Your content here

 ``` ЁЯУЭ Notes - Overlay automatically disappears when `show={false}`. - Use `ref` to programmatically open or close the overlay.

item.title: Pagination - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Pagination is a component for navigating through pages of content. It supports numbered buttons, previous/next controls, and a combobox for large page sets.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯФД **Previous & Next buttons** for back-and-forth sequential navigation - ЁЯФв **Numbered page buttons** for direct access - ЁЯзй **Combobox** for selecting pages when total pages exceed a threshold - ЁЯОи Customizable styles for container, buttons, and select box - тЪб Handles active state and disabled state for navigation buttons - ЁЯУП Supports flexible page ranges and thresholds
--- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Set `currentPage` and `totalPages` to control pagination - Use `onPageChange` to handle page switching - Enable `showNumbers` to display numbered page buttons - Customize styles via the `styles` prop: - `containerStyle` тАУ for wrapper - `buttonStyle` тАУ for individual buttons - `selectboxStyle` тАУ for the combobox - The combobox automatically appears when pages exceed 5

item.title: PaperDialog - Coneto React UI
item.description:
ЁЯУД **PaperDialog** is a fully customizable slide-in dialog component that can appear from the left or right side of the viewport. тЬи Features - ЁЯОм Slide-in / Slide-out animations using Framer Motion - ЁЯЯв Supports three states: `restored`, `minimized`, and `closed` - тЭМ Optional close button and minimize toggle - ЁЯЫб Overlay blocker when restored to prevent outside interactions - ЁЯОЫ Trigger opening/closing externally - ЁЯОи Fully styleable via `styles` props - тМия╕П Handles "Escape" key to close the dialog ЁЯЫа Usage ```tsx Open Dialog

Your content here

 ``` ЁЯУЭ Notes - Always include both `PaperDialog.Trigger` and `PaperDialog.Content` as children. - Use `styles` prop to override default styles.

item.title: Phonebox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Phonebox** is a phone number input component with automated phone formatter for increased legibility.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯМР **Country code selector**: Choose your country code with flags and search. - ЁЯФв **Phone input formatting**: Formats the number automatically based on selected country. - ЁЯСЖ **Keyboard & mouse navigation**: Supports arrow keys, Enter, and Escape in dropdown. - тЪая╕П **Error handling**: Visual feedback and optional error messages. - ЁЯУЭ **Helper text**: Add helper text below the input. - ЁЯФз **Custom styles**: Styles for wrapper, input, toggle button, and dropdown. - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**

item.title: Pinbox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Pinbox** is a multi-part input component used for entering codes, PINs, OTPs, or other structured sequences. It supports having static characters, pasting value from clipboard, as well as keyboard navigation among other things.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯФв **Multi-part input**: Each character or block is a separate input for better control. - ЁЯСБя╕П **Masked input**: Optionally mask sensitive characters. - тМия╕П **Keyboard navigation**: Supports arrow keys, backspace, and tab to move between inputs. - тЪая╕П **Error states**: Visual indication for invalid input. - ЁЯУЭ **Helper text**: Supports extra helper text under the input. - ЁЯФз **Custom styles**: Styles for the wrapper, inputs, and error indicators. - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**

item.title: Radio - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Radio is a form input component used to select a single option from a group. It supports multiple rendering modes (classic radio or button style), icons, descriptions, error states, and highlight-on-checked behavior.
--- тЬи Features - тЪк **Classic radio / button style**: Choose between traditional radio circles or interactive button style. - ЁЯЦ╝ **Optional icons**: Display an icon next to the label (supports images or custom icons). - ЁЯУЭ **Descriptions**: Add secondary text under the label for extra context. - ЁЯЦМ **Highlighting**: Highlight container when selected. - ЁЯЪл **Disabled / error states**: Supports fully disabled or error visuals. - ЁЯФз **Custom styles**: Customize almost every element using a `styles` object.

item.title: Rating - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Rating** is a star-based input component for capturing user ratings with optional half-star support.
--- тЬи Features - тнР **Editable or read-only**: Can be interactive or display-only. - ЁЯМУ **Half-star support**: Accurately capture half-star ratings on mouse hover. - ЁЯФв **Optional label**: Display numeric rating (e.g., 3.5 / 5) next to stars. - ЁЯЦМ **Sizes**: Small (sm), Medium (md), Large (lg). - ЁЯФз **Custom styles**: Can style container, label, or star wrapper. - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**

item.title: RichEditor - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**RichEditor** is a Markdown-rendering rich text editor.
- Supports bold, italic, ordered/unordered list, and headings - Supports checklists with `[]` (unchecked) and `[x]` (checked) - Uses custom turndown rules for markdown conversion - Includes a floating tip menu for H1-H3 heading options - Optional right-panel toolbar

item.title: Searchbox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Searchbox** is a flexible search input component with optional result menu support and clear button. --- тЬи Features - ЁЯУЭ **Controlled or uncontrolled input** - тЭМ **Clearable input**: Delete the current value with a click - ЁЯУЛ **Optional result menu**: Pass a render function for dropdown search results - ЁЯОи **Custom styling** via `styles` prop - тМия╕П **Keyboard & focus handling** supported - тЩ┐ **Accessible**: ARIA labels and roles included --- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx setSearchText(e.target.value)} styles={{ self: css`border-color: #ccc;`, containerStyle: css`margin: 0 auto; width: 300px;`, iconStyle: css`color: blue;`, }} showResultMenu={true} resultMenu={(props) =>
Result Item
} /> ```

item.title: Selectbox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Selectbox** is a flexible and customizable input component that supports searchable dropdowns, single and multiple selection, keyboard navigation, and both controlled and uncontrolled usage. It is designed to handle complex interaction patterns such as filtering, strict validation, async loading states, and fully custom dropdown rendering via render props. --- тЬи Features - Searchable options with filtering - Single and multiple selection modes - Full keyboard navigation support - Controlled and uncontrolled behavior - Strict mode validation (enforces valid options) - Clearable input support - Loading state with customizable label - Fully customizable styles - Render prop support for custom dropdown UI --- ЁЯз▒ Basic Usage ```tsx ``` --- ЁЯФБ Controlled Mode Use controlled mode when you need to **synchronize and manage the value from the parent state**. ```tsx const [value, setValue] = useState("apple"); ``` --- ЁЯОп Multiple Selection ```tsx console.log(values)} /> ``` --- тЪЩя╕П Strict Mode When `strict` is enabled: - Only values from `options` are allowed - Invalid input will be reverted or cleared ```tsx ``` --- ЁЯзй Custom Dropdown (Render Props) ```tsx {({ options, highlightedIndex }) => (
    {options.map((opt, index) => (
  • {opt.text}
    • ))}
)} ``` --- тП│ Loading State ```tsx ``` --- ЁЯОи Styling ```tsx

item.title: Separator - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Separator is a visual divider component that separates content into sections with an optional title.
--- тЬи Features - тЮЦ **Divider line**: Adds a horizontal line across the container. - ЁЯФд **Optional title**: Can display a floating text over the line. - тЖФя╕П **Text float**: Title can float left or right. - ЁЯз▒ **Custom depth**: Adjust distance of the title from the container edge. - ЁЯОи **Customizable styles**: Supports container, line, and title styling via CSS props.

item.title: Sidebar - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Sidebar** is a responsive sidebar container. Users can do swipe gestures to close or open the sidebar when on a mobile phone. You can define any sidebar item to be fixed or scrollable. --- тЬи Features - ЁЯЦе **Responsive layout**: Automatically switches between mobile (toggleable) and desktop (always visible) modes. - ЁЯУ▒ **Mobile swipe support**: Swipe left/right to open or close the sidebar. - ЁЯЦМ **Custom styling**: Customize mobile and desktop styles independently via the `styles` prop. - тЖФя╕П **Positioning**: Can be placed on the left or right of the screen via the `position` prop. - ЁЯзй **Composable children**: Add items, spacers, or custom content. - ЁЯФз **Sidebar.Item**: Individual items inside the sidebar, with optional fixed height. - тЪб **Sidebar.Spacer**: Add flexible spacing with configurable widths for mobile and desktop. --- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx
Fixed content
Scrollable content
 ```

item.title: Signbox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Signbox** is a component that allows users to draw their signature directly on a canvas.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯЦК **Draw signature**: Users can draw directly on a canvas. - ЁЯз╣ **Clearable**: Optional clear button to reset the signature. - ЁЯЦМ **Customizable style**: Control the canvas, border, and size through styles. - тЪб **Responsive**: Canvas auto-scales on window resize for high-DPI displays. - ЁЯФТ **Disabled mode**: Prevent drawing when needed. - ЁЯТб **Error state**: Visual feedback when the signature is required or invalid. - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**

item.title: StatefulForm - Coneto React UI
Statusbar - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Statusbar** is a flexible bottom bar component to display actions, icons, buttons, or status information. It supports left and right sections, customizable styling, spacing, transparency, and dynamic content.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯФ╣ **Left & Right sections** тАУ Display items independently on both sides - ЁЯЦ╝ **Icons & Text** тАУ Supports icons, labels, or custom render functions - ЁЯФШ **Buttons** тАУ Integrates button-like components seamlessly - ЁЯОи **Custom styles** тАУ Configure styles for container, items, left/right wrappers - ЁЯЯв **Active & Hover states** тАУ Custom background colors for active and hover states - тЪЦ **Flexible sizing** тАУ Adjustable font/icon sizes - ЁЯМР **Transparent mode** тАУ Render the statusbar with less border to make it even more minimalistic - ЁЯЫа **Spacers** тАУ Add responsive spacing with `Statusbar.Spacer`
--- ЁЯЫа Usage
```tsx <Statusbar size={12} activeBackgroundColor="#e0e0e0" hoverBackgroundColor="#f5f5f5" transparent={false} content={{ left: [ { text: "Home", icon: { name: "home" } }, { button: { children: "Save", onClick: () => alert("Saved!") } }, ], right: [ { text: "Profile", icon: { name: "user" } }, { render: <CustomComponent /> }, ], }} styles={{ self: css`padding: 4px 12px;`, itemStyle: css`color: #333;`, leftWrapperStyle: css`gap: 8px;`, rightWrapperStyle: css`gap: 8px;`, }} /> ```

item.title: Stepline - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Stepline is a horizontal step indicator component designed for workflows, progress tracking, or multi-step forms. It supports icons, labels, collapsible tooltips, customizable styles, and click events for individual steps.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯЦ▒ **Clickable steps**: Each step can trigger an `onClick` callback. - ЁЯУР **Custom spacing**: Use the `gap` prop to adjust space between steps. - ЁЯЫа **Custom styles**: Fully styleable using `styles` prop for wrapper, circles, and text. - ЁЯОи **Variants**: Steps can have different variants (`todo`, `current`, `completed`, `error`). - ЁЯЦМ **Collapsible mode**: Collapse step labels and show them as tooltips when hovered. - ЁЯУж **Composable children**: Each step can have a title, subtitle, and custom sidenotes.
--- ЁЯФз Props
| Prop | Type | Default | Description | |------|------|---------|-------------| | `children` | ReactNode | тАФ | Step components (`Stepline.Item`) to render inside the stepline. | | `styles` | SteplineStylesProps | тАФ | Custom CSS styles for the wrapper. | | `gap` | number | 8 | Space in pixels between steps. | | `collapsed` | boolean | false | Collapses step labels into tooltips. |
--- ЁЯФз Stepline.Item Props
| Prop | Type | Default | Description | |------|------|---------|-------------| | `title` | string | тАФ | Step main title. | | `subtitle` | string | тАФ | Step subtitle or description. | | `variant` | 'todo' | 'current' | 'completed' | 'error' | 'todo' | Step visual variant affecting circle color and line color. | | `active` | boolean | false | Scale the outer circle to indicate active state. | | `onClick` | () => void | тАФ | Callback when the step is clicked. | | `styles` | SteplineItemStylesProps | тАФ | Custom styles for the item, outer/inner circle, and text wrapper. |
--- ЁЯУМ Usage
```tsx <Stepline gap={16} collapsed={false} styles={{ self: css`padding: 1rem;` }}> <Stepline.Item title="Step 1" subtitle="Start" variant="completed" onClick={() => console.log("Step 1 clicked")} /> <Stepline.Item title="Step 2" subtitle="In progress" variant="current" /> <Stepline.Item title="Step 3" subtitle="Review" variant="todo" active /> <Stepline.Item title="Step 4" subtitle="Complete" variant="todo" /> </Stepline> ```
- Use `gap` to adjust spacing between steps. - Set `collapsed` to show labels inside tooltips instead of inline. - Pass `onClick` to handle step click events. - Fully style via `styles.self` for wrapper or individual step styles.

item.title: Table - Coneto React UI
item.description:
The **Table** component is a powerful and flexible data display component designed for handling complex datasets with rich interactions such as selection, drag-and-drop, grouping, and pagination. --- тЬи Features - тЬЕ **Row selection** with checkbox support (single/multi) - ЁЯФН Optional **search filtering** via integrated Searchbox - ЁЯз▓ **Drag-and-drop** row reordering (with grouping support) - ЁЯУВ **Grouped rows** with collapsible sections - тЪб **Infinite scroll** support via last row detection - ЁЯУК Built-in **pagination controls** - ЁЯОп Custom **row actions** & contextual menus - ЁЯзй Fully customizable **styles per section** - ЁЯУМ Support for **summary rows** - тП│ Built-in **loading overlay** --- ЁЯз▒ Component Structure ```tsx // only row // with group
``` --- ЁЯУж Column Definition ```tsx { id: string; caption: string; sortable?: boolean; width?: string; styles?: { self?: CSSProp; }; } ``` --- тЪЩя╕П Core Behaviors Selection - Enable with `selectable` - Controlled via `selectedItems` - Callback: `onItemsSelected(ids: string[])` Drag & Drop - Enable with `draggable` - Works across groups - Callback provides: ``` { id: string; oldGroupId: string; newGroupId: string; oldPosition: number; newPosition: number; } ``` Search - Enable with `searchable` - Customize using `searchbox` props - Integrates seamlessly with header Pagination - Enable with `showPagination` - Supports: - Next / Previous callbacks - Disabled states - Custom labels Infinite Scroll - Use `onLastRowReached` to detect bottom visibility - Ideal for lazy loading / large datasets --- ЁЯзй Row Types Basic Row ```tsx ``` Custom Cell Rendering ```tsx Custom Content ``` Grouped Row ```tsx ``` --- ЁЯОп Actions - Header actions via `actions` - Row-level actions via `actions(rowId)` - Supports: - Button - Capsule (toggle-like UI) --- ЁЯУК Summary Row ```tsx [ { span?: number; content?: ReactNode; bold?: boolean; } ] ``` - Rendered at the bottom - Supports column spanning --- ЁЯУМ Usage Guidelines - Use **grouped rows** for hierarchical or categorized data - Enable **dragging** only when ordering matters - Use **controlled selection** for syncing with external state - Combine **pagination + infinite scroll** carefully (avoid overlap) - Provide meaningful **emptySlate** content for better UX - Use **summary rows** for totals or aggregated data

item.title: Textarea - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Textarea** is a multi-line text input component with optional auto-growing height, among other things.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯУЭ **Multi-line input**: Accepts multiple lines with customizable rows. - ЁЯУП **Autogrow**: Automatically increases height as user types if `autogrow` is enabled. - тЪая╕П **Error handling**: Shows visual error indication and optional message with `showError` and `errorMessage`. - ЁЯОи **Custom styles**: Fully styleable via the `styles` prop for both FieldLane and textarea itself. - ЁЯФШ **Actions**: Render action buttons inside the input for things like copy, paste, or custom icons. - ЁЯФТ **Disabled support**: Proper styling and interaction handling for disabled state. - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**
--- ЁЯУМ Usage
```tsx <Textarea name="description" label="Description" placeholder="Type something..." rows={4} autogrow showError={false} errorMessage="This field is required" actions={[ { title: "Copy", icon: { name: "copy" }, onClick: () => console.log("Copy") } ]} onChange={(e) => console.log(e.target.value)} styles={{ self: css`border-color: blue;`, }} /> ```
- Use `autogrow` to let the textarea expand automatically. - Use `actions` to show buttons/icons inside the input. - Use `showError` and `errorMessage` for validation feedback. - Fully styleable via `styles.self`.

item.title: Textbox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Textbox** is a single-line text input component. Among other things, you can define action buttons right within the textbox.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯЦК **Labels and helper text**: Display a label above or beside the input, with optional helper text. - тЪая╕П **Validation states**: Show error states and messages with `showError` + `errorMessage`. - ЁЯЦ▒ **Action icons**: Add buttons/icons inside the input for actions like toggling password visibility or clearing content. - ЁЯУЬ **Custom dropdowns**: Attach dropdowns for enriching interaction. - ЁЯОи **Custom styling**: Full control over input, label, container, and dropdown styles via the `styles` prop. - ЁЯЪл **Disabled/readonly**: Prevent user interaction when needed. - ЁЯУж **Composable children**: Use nested dropdowns or actions seamlessly. - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**
--- ЁЯФз Textbox Props - `name` (string): Name attribute for forms. - `label` (string): Text displayed above the input. - `placeholder` (string): Placeholder text when the input is empty. - `value` (string): Current input value. - `type` ('text' | 'password' | 'message' | 'hidden'): Input type. - `showError` (boolean): Toggle the error state. - `errorMessage` (string): Message shown when `showError` is true. - `actions` (array): Array of action objects inside the input: - `icon` (FigureProps) тАУ optional icon - `title` (string) тАУ optional tooltip - `onClick` (function) тАУ callback - `disabled` (boolean) тАУ disables the action - `dropdowns` (array): Array of dropdown configurations: - `options` (array) тАУ list of selectable options - `withFilter` (boolean) тАУ enable search/filter - `render` (function) тАУ custom rendering for dropdown content - `onChange` (function) тАУ called when an option is selected - `onChange` (function): Triggered when input value changes. - `helper` (string): Optional helper text under the input. - `disabled` (boolean): Disables the input. - `required` (boolean): Marks input as required. - `labelPosition` ('top' | 'left' | 'right'): Position of label relative to input. - `labelWidth` (string): Width of label in horizontal layout. - `labelGap` (string): Gap between label and input. - `styles` (object): Customize styles for input and container: - `self` тАУ input element - `containerStyle` тАУ outer container - `bodyStyle` тАУ FieldLane body - `controlStyle` тАУ input container - `labelStyle` тАУ label text
--- ЁЯУМ Usage
```tsx <Textbox label="Username" placeholder="Enter your username" type="text" showError={false} errorMessage="Invalid username" actions={[ { icon: <RiEyeLine />, onClick: () => console.log('Clicked') }, ]} dropdowns={[ { options: [{ id: '1', label: 'Option 1' }], withFilter: true } ]} styles={{ self: css`border-color: blue;`, containerStyle: css`background: #f0f0f0;`, }} onChange={(e) => console.log(e.target.value)} /> ```
- Use `actions` to add icons or buttons inside the input. - Add `dropdowns` for suggestion lists or autocomplete. - Mark errors with `showError` and `errorMessage`. - Customize appearance with `styles`. - Add helper text or custom label positioning as needed.

item.title: ThumbField - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**ThumbField** is a thumbs-up / thumbs-down input component designed for feedback, rating, or like/dislike functionality.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯСН **Thumb selection**: Users can select either "up" or "down" or leave blank. - ЁЯЦМ **Custom colors**: Configure active thumbs colors via `thumbsUpBackgroundColor` and `thumbsDownBackgroundColor`. - тЪая╕П **Error state**: Shows an error icon when `showError` is true. - ЁЯЫа **Custom styling**: Style the triggers and wrapper via `styles`. - ЁЯФТ **Disabled support**: Disable user interaction with `disabled`. - ЁЯУж **Form integration**: Works with `StatefulForm` and hidden input for form submission. - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**
--- ЁЯУМ Usage
```tsx <ThumbField label="Do you like this feature?" value={null} thumbsUpBackgroundColor="#4CAF50" thumbsDownBackgroundColor="#F44336" onChange={(e) => console.log("Selected value:", e.target.value)} showError={false} /> ```
- Use `value` and `onChange` to control the field programmatically. - Customize active thumb colors via `thumbsUpBackgroundColor` and `thumbsDownBackgroundColor`. - Set `disabled` to prevent interactions. - Wrap in `FieldLane` for label, helper, and error message support.

item.title: Timebox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
**Timebox** is a time input component allowing users to enter hours, minutes, and optionally seconds. It supports smart focus navigation, editable/non-editable modes, and error display.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯХТ **Hour & Minute Input**: Users can input hours and minutes, optionally seconds. - тП▒ **withSeconds**: Enables second input for precise time selection. - ЁЯОп **Smart Focus**: Automatically moves focus to the next field when needed. - тЪая╕П **Error Handling**: Shows error styling when `showError` is true. - ЁЯФТ **Editable Mode**: Can be read-only when `editable` is false. - ЁЯОи **Custom Styling**: Fully customizable via `styles` prop. - ЁЯзй First-class **stateful form integration**
--- ЁЯУМ Usage
```tsx <Timebox name="startTime" label="Start Time" value="08:30" withSeconds editable showError={false} placeholder={{ hour: "HH", minute: "MM", second: "SS" }} onChange={(e) => console.log(e.target.value)} styles={{ self: css`border-color: blue;`, inputWrapperStyle: css`background: #f0f0f0;`, }} /> ```
- Use `withSeconds` to enable seconds input. - Use `editable={false}` to make the input read-only. - Use `styles` to customize input and wrapper styling. - The `onChange` callback returns a formatted string `HH:MM:SS`.

item.title: Timeline - Coneto React UI
item.description: Timeline is a flexible component for displaying sequential events or steps in a vertical layout. It supports custom items (`Timeline.Item`), clickable states, variant-based colors, line styles, and full style overrides. --- тЬи Features - ЁЯПЧ **Composable**: Each step is a `Timeline.Item` that can render title, subtitle, and optional sidenotes. - ЁЯОи **Variants**: Item colors can reflect status such as 'todo', 'inProgress', 'done', etc. - ЁЯСЖ **Clickable items**: Enable `isClickable` to allow clicks on each timeline item. - ЁЯЦМ **Styling flexibility**: Customize circles, text, lines, and containers via the `styles` prop. - ЁЯФЧ **Line types**: Connectors can be 'solid', 'dash', or 'dot'. --- ЁЯФз Timeline Props - `children` (ReactNode): Timeline.Item components to render. - `isClickable` (boolean): Makes all timeline items clickable. ЁЯФз Timeline.Item Props - `title` (string): Main title text of the step. - `subtitle` (string): Secondary description or detail under the title. - `sidenote` (ReactNode): Optional content displayed beside the item. - `variant` (string): Status/variant of the item, affects colors. Options from `TEXT_VARIANT_COLOR`. - `styles` (TimelineItemStylesProps): Customize styling for item sub-elements. - `self` тАУ container wrapper - `textWrapperStyle` тАУ wrapper for title & subtitle - `titleStyle` тАУ title text - `subtitleStyle` тАУ subtitle text - `sidenoteStyle` тАУ sidenote container - `isClickable` (boolean): Override for item-specific clickability. - `id` (string | number): Optional ID for the item (defaults to index). - `onClick` (function): Callback when the item is clicked. - `line` ('solid' | 'dash' | 'dot'): Line style for the connector below the item circle. --- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx console.log('Step 1 clicked')} /> Optional note} /> ``` - Use `isClickable` on `Timeline` to make all items interactive. - Use `Timeline.Item` for each step; customize title, subtitle, variant, line, and optional sidenotes. - Styles can be overridden via the `styles` prop for full layout and color control.

item.title: TipMenu - Coneto React UI
item.description:
TipMenu is a flexible dropdown menu component that supports optional filtering, icons, and different variants per item. It is commonly used for action menus, context menus, or inline tips. --- тЬи Features - ЁЯЦ▒ **Clickable menu items**: Each item supports an onClick handler. - ЁЯФН **Optional search/filter**: Automatically filter menu items with `withFilter`. - ЁЯОи **Item variants**: Supports `sm` and `md` variants for spacing and size. - тЪая╕П **Dangerous actions**: Items can be styled to indicate dangerous actions (e.g., delete). - ЁЯЦМ **Custom styles**: Full styling support via `styles` prop. - ЁЯУж **Composable children**: Render additional custom content inside the menu. - ЁЯОи **Icon support**: Each menu item can have an optional icon rendered via the `Figure` component. --- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx console.log("Edit clicked") }, { caption: "Delete", isDangerous: true, onClick: () => console.log("Deleted") }, { caption: "View", variant: "sm" } ]} withFilter variant="md" setIsOpen={() => console.log("Menu closed")} styles={{ self: css`min-width: 200px;`, }} >
Custom content at the bottom
 ``` - Use `subMenuList` to define menu items. - Use `withFilter` to enable the search box. - Use `variant` to change spacing and sizing for items. - Use `isDangerous` to highlight critical actions. - Fully styleable via `styles.self`. - You can still pass custom children if needed.

item.title: Togglebox - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Togglebox is a flexible toggle switch component for React, designed for binary on/off states. It supports icons, loading states, custom sizes, labels, descriptions, and full styling control. It integrates seamlessly with `FieldLane` for form layout and validation support.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯФШ **Binary toggle**: Represents on/off or true/false states. - ЁЯП╖ **Label and description**: Display text next to the toggle for context. - ЁЯОи **Custom icons**: Render an optional icon inside the toggle thumb. - тП│ **Loading state**: Show a spinner while an action is processing. - ЁЯУР **Resizable**: Control toggle size via the `size` prop. - ЁЯзй **Composable**: Integrates with `FieldLane` for structured form layouts. - ЁЯОЫ **Full styling control**: Override styles for label, description, row, text wrapper, error messages, and toggle thumb.
--- ЁЯУМ Usage
```tsx <Togglebox checked={true} label="Enable notifications" description="Receive email updates for new activity" icon={{ image: RiNotificationLine, color: "white" }} size={32} isLoading={false} onChange={(e) => console.log("Toggle changed:", e.target.checked)} styles={{ rowStyle: css`margin-top: 16px;`, textWrapperStyle: css`gap: 4px;`, labelStyle: css`font-weight: 600;`, descriptionStyle: css`color: #6B7280;`, }} />
{/* Integration with FieldLane and validation */} <Togglebox title="Enable dark mode" label="Dark Mode" showError={true} errorMessage="This toggle is required" helper="Toggle to switch theme" required /> ```
--- ЁЯТб Notes - Clicking the toggle updates the `checked` state. - The toggle thumb can display a custom icon or loading spinner. - Fully responsive and accessible тАФ includes labels, ARIA attributes, and keyboard support. - Works with `FieldLane` for structured forms with labels, errors, and helper text. - Use the `styles` prop to override individual sub-elements without breaking default behavior. - `size` controls the toggle width, height, and thumb dimensions automatically.

item.title: Toolbar - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Toolbar is a flexible control bar component for React, designed to display multiple interactive buttons with optional dropdown menus, icons, and custom styles. It is suitable for building rich action bars, tool panels, or context menus in applications.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯЫа **Toolbar container**: Organizes multiple `Toolbar.Menu` items horizontally by default. - ЁЯП╖ **Toolbar.Menu**: Each menu can have a caption, an icon, and an optional dropdown sub-menu. - ЁЯФА **Variants**: Supports `default`, `primary`, and `danger` modes for visual emphasis. - ЁЯФД **Interactive states**: Hover, active, focus-visible, and open states are styled out-of-the-box. - тмЖя╕ПтмЗя╕П **Dropdown menus**: Sub-menu lists can be fully customized with `ToolbarSubMenuProps`. - тЪб **Dynamic sizing**: Supports a `big` mode for larger icons and vertically-aligned content. - ЁЯОи **Styling flexibility**: Customize the container, trigger, toggle button, and dropdown via the `styles` prop. - ЁЯзй **Composable children**: Place any custom JSX or multiple `Toolbar.Menu` items inside a toolbar.
--- ЁЯУМ Usage
```tsx const subMenuList: ToolbarSubMenuProps[] = [ { caption: "Edit", icon: { image: RiEditLine, color: "yellow" }, onClick: () => console.log("Edit mode") }, { caption: "Delete", icon: { image: RiForbid2Line, color: "red" }, isDangerous: true, onClick: () => console.log("Deleted") }, ];
<Toolbar big> <Toolbar.Menu caption="Default Mode" icon={{ image: RiMessage2Line, color: "red" }} subMenuList={subMenuList} /> <Toolbar.Menu caption="Primary Mode" icon={{ image: RiMessage2Line, color: "white" }} variant="primary" subMenuList={subMenuList} /> <Toolbar.Menu caption="Danger Mode" icon={{ image: RiMessage2Line, color: "white" }} variant="danger" subMenuList={subMenuList} /> </Toolbar> ```
- **Toolbar** arranges multiple menus horizontally. - **Toolbar.Menu** can display a caption, icon, and optional dropdown. - Dropdown menus are defined with `subMenuList`, each item supporting: - `caption` - `icon` (image + color) - `onClick` callback - `isDangerous` for destructive actions. - **Variants** apply predefined colors and hover/active/focus states: - `default` тАФ standard gray/white styles. - `primary` тАФ emphasized with blue background and white text. - `danger` тАФ red background for destructive actions. - **big** prop enlarges icons and vertically centers content for toolbars that require higher visibility. - **styles** prop allows CSS overrides for: - `self` тАФ toolbar wrapper - `containerStyle` тАФ individual menu container - `triggerStyle` тАФ menu button - `toggleActiveStyle` тАФ dropdown toggle - `dropdownStyle` тАФ dropdown menu container
--- ЁЯТб Notes - Clicking outside an open menu automatically closes it. - Each menu manages its own open/close state but can also be controlled externally via `isOpen` and `setIsOpen`. - Hover and active states are handled automatically, including special styles for dangerous actions. - Supports responsive behavior тАФ captions are hidden for smaller screens if `icon` is provided. - Fully compatible with any React project using Styled Components.

item.title: Tooltip - Coneto React UI
TreeList - Coneto React UI
item.description:
TreeList is a flexible hierarchical list component designed to display items and groups in a tree-like structure. It supports collapsible groups, drag-and-drop ordering, selection management, and custom actions for both items and groups. Ideal for complex menus, file explorers, task lists, or any nested content visualization.
--- тЬи Features - ЁЯП╖ **Collapsible groups**: Expand or collapse groups to show or hide child items. - ЁЯЦ▒ **Drag-and-drop**: Reorder or nest items easily using drag handles. - ЁЯзй **Selection management**: Track active or selected items for interactive use cases. - ЁЯОи **Custom actions**: Add buttons or menu items per group or globally. - ЁЯФН **Search-friendly**: Highlight matching items when filtering by search terms. - тЫФ **Empty state**: Shows a placeholder message when groups have no items.
--- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx <TreeList content={[ { id: "fruits", caption: "Fruits", items: [ { id: "apple", caption: "Apple" }, { id: "banana", caption: "Banana" }, ], }, { id: "vegetables", caption: "Vegetables", items: [ { id: "carrot", caption: "Carrot" }, { id: "broccoli", caption: "Broccoli" }, ], }, ]} collapsible draggable alwaysShowDragIcon emptyItemSlate="No items here" /> ```
- Use `content` to define groups and their child items. - Set `collapsible` to allow groups to expand or collapse. - Set `draggable` and `alwaysShowDragIcon` to enable item reordering. - Provide `emptyItemSlate` for placeholder text when groups have no items. - Add `actions` for per-item or per-group interactive buttons.

item.title: Window - Coneto React UI
item.description:
Window is a flexible container component that allows splitting content into resizable cells. It supports horizontal or vertical layouts, custom styles, draggable dividers, and cell-level actions such as buttons or icons. ItтАЩs ideal for dashboards, editors, or any UI requiring adjustable panels. --- тЬи Features - тЖФя╕П **Resizable cells**: Drag dividers to adjust the size of adjacent cells. - ЁЯЦе **Orientation support**: Configure layout as "horizontal" (row) or "vertical" (column). - ЁЯзй **Flexible children**: Embed any ReactNode inside cells, including forms, tables, or custom components. - ЁЯОи **Customizable styles**: Override container styles (`self`) and divider styles (`dividerStyle`). - ЁЯЦ▒ **Cell actions**: Add buttons or icons in each cell with click handlers and optional visibility. - ЁЯУР **Initial sizing**: Provide an initial size ratio array (e.g., `[0.3, 0.7]`) for each cell. - тЪб **Performance-optimized**: Resize operations are throttled using `requestAnimationFrame` to ensure smooth dragging. - тЫФ **Disabled dragging**: Cells can ignore pointer events during dragging to prevent interaction conflicts. --- ЁЯУМ Usage ```tsx console.log("Resizing...")} onResizeComplete={() => console.log("Resize complete")} > console.log("Cell 1 close clicked"), }, ]} >
Left content
 console.log("Cell 2 close clicked"), }, ]} >
Right content
 ``` - Use `orientation` to control layout direction. - Provide `initialSizeRatio` to control starting sizes of cells. - Add any ReactNode as content for each `Window.Cell`. - Use `actions` to attach buttons or icons inside a cell. - Fully styleable via the `styles` prop for both container and dividers. - Listen to `onResize` and `onResizeComplete` for drag events.
